notes: Basic Action Discovery — hello first; protocolVersion; app.id regex; trust capabilities; tool list
Action Invocation with Valid Input — invocationId in result; output field; validate input before handler
Input Validation Failure — validate before handler; -32004 error; handler must not run
Long-Running Action with Progress — percent should increase monotonically
Action Confirmation — confirm schema; ctx.confirm returns False when no elicitation; capability gating
Sampling — validate sampling content; check capability; SamplingNotAvailableError class
Transport Drop During Active Invocation — pending rejected; cancellation fired; subscriptions cleaned; in-flight calls rejected
Dynamic Action Registration — list_changed on add; list_changed on remove
Resource Subscription — cleanup on unsubscribe; list_changed; cleanup on close; clear map; specific cleanup
Multiple Apps Simultaneously — app.id routing (distinct app IDs)
Elicitation — handler must branch; schema constraints (object type
Capability Gating — trust intersection; use agentCapabilities after claimed; trust intersection
Session Resume — stash resumeToken; persist new token; re-subscribe resources
Resume Failure and Fallback — clear credentials and fall back to hello
Action Timeout — abort after timeoutMs; -32002 Timeout; race handler against timeout
Handler Error Propagation — TesseronError mapped; other exception mapped to -32005
Strict Output Validation — validate return value; -32005 with validation issues
Structured Logging — no direct RFC 2119 requirement in extracted set (log notification is fire-and-forget)
Claimed Notification Updates Capabilities — update identity; clear claim code; overwrite capabilities; use agentCapabilities; overwrite on claimed
Concurrent Invocations — race handler independently per invocation
